measurement_note: Size is N, the number of target entries. Every tier uses the legal 30-bit value 1000000000, forcing bit accounting for every entry while sharing the same 29 global doublings. The remotely Accepted bit-count scan and an independent reverse-bit scan are O(NB). A correct implementation that redundantly recomputes every prefix maximum performs O(N^2 + NB), completes every tier, and is rejected only by scaling.
